evals.prompt: feature X crashes when I give it an empty input
evals.expected_output: Classified as bug. Investigates the feature X handler in the codebase and finds it lacks an empty/null guard. Records in docs/bugs.md with next available ID. Reports the classification to the user.
Reads docs/tasks.md 'New' section. For each item: investigates code, checks for duplicates in bugs.md and features.md, classifies, records, moves to Triaged section.

evals.prompt: can we add support for Y? the current module only handles the basic case
evals.expected_output: Classified as feature (never implemented, or partial). Investigates the existing module in the codebase. Records in docs/features.md. Does NOT start implementing.

evals.prompt: switching from option A to option B fails and the result never appears
evals.expected_output: Classified as bug. Investigates the relevant module and the state/store that holds the active option. Records in docs/bugs.md. Reports the classification to the user.

evals.prompt: the app hangs when I hit cancel mid-operation — the UI stays stuck on 'working'
evals.expected_output: Classified as bug. Investigates the cancel/abort handling in the relevant module. Records in docs/bugs.md with next available ID. Reports the classification to the user.
